claims.text: Nic Ferris is the creator of the open-source project Tracewell.
claims.evidence: nferris/tracewell: open-source evaluation harness for LLM agent pipelines

claims.text: Nic Ferris has maintained a streak of 61 consecutive days with commits to the Tracewell repository from 2026-05-16 to 2026-07-15.
Tracewell repository has achieved over 1420 stars and involvement from 40+ external issue filers in 9 weeks.
claims.evidence: 9 weeks old). stars=1420, 40+ external issue filers.

claims.text: Tracewell has received positive attention with a Show HN post achieving 890 points and being the #2 Show HN of its day.
claims.evidence: Show HN: Tracewell – CI-style regression tests for LLM agent behavior | author=nferris points=890 — #2 Show HN of its day.

claims.text: Tracewell’s PyPI package receives approximately 3,100 weekly downloads.
No employment or education claims made anywhere public for Nic Ferris.
claims.evidence: No employment or education claims made anywhere public; searched public company registries for a Tracewell incorporation: no filing found — negative result, company not incorporated.

claims.text: Tracewell is not incorporated; search of public company registries returned no filings.
claims.evidence: searched public company registries for a Tracewell incorporation: no filing found

claims.text: Nic Ferris is the solo maintainer of Tracewell; no commercial track record found for the project.
claims.evidence: Solo maintainer; no commercial track record found.
